It's both a recap & an intro for new and old alike.

https://t.co/84ohiI6Fue 

#TV #Philippines #Teleserye

artifacts.title: Philippines receipt from 2020-01-12
artifacts.excerpt: @jannomaala @micoblanko Nope. The lake was a volcano (not supervolcano) crater some 500,000 years ago. It's dead, no name. Sea water entered. Then the channel closed up. Over time the water changed to fresh water, the species adapted. Then the overflow of the water spilled to Balayan Bay.
